goal: Add a read-only cockpit HTML renderer for BPK-009 cockpit projection models. The renderer must be side-effect-free, keep all actions disabled, and be visually verifiable as a static HTML preview. Do not add server routes, runtime calls, provider calls, database writes, GitHub writes, package changes, deployment changes, or live AICOS calls.
scope_out: Do not mount a route or introduce a frontend framework.
Do not add package scripts, dependencies, environment variables, deployment notes, runtime calls, provider calls, DB writes, GitHub writes, or live AICOS calls.
claims: A read-only cockpit UI can be rendered from a BPK-009 cockpit projection model without server wiring.
All actions remain disabled in the rendered UI.
The renderer escapes model text before producing HTML.
The static preview can be visually verified without committing generated preview artifacts.
assumptions: A later block may mount this renderer behind a server route.
The renderer is an HTML surface, not a live application shell.
Generated visual-check artifacts are temporary and not committed.
dod: The renderer outputs a complete HTML document with read-only panels and disabled actions.
builder/tests/cockpitReadOnlyHtml.test.ts covers ready/review/blocked rendering, escaping, disabled actions, and no-mutation behavior.
A temporary static preview is opened or checked with Playwright/browser tooling and not committed.
review-packets/BPK-018.md records scope, safety invariants, gates, and verification.
The focused cockpit HTML test and npm run typecheck in builder/ pass.
stop_conditions: A server route, runtime call, provider call, DB write, GitHub write, package change, deployment change, live AICOS call, or framework setup becomes necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-014 planned the cockpit UI and visual evidence gates. BPK-018 should add the first read-only HTML surface without runtime wiring.
